claim: Open-source language models from Qwen and similar projects are rapidly closing capability gaps with proprietary models
actionable: Regularly benchmark open-source models against closed alternatives; consider open models for cost-sensitive deployments

claim: Open-source models enable fine-tuning and domain-specific optimization for lower cost and better control than API-based solutions
actionable: For privacy-sensitive or specialized domains, invest in fine-tuning open-source models as alternative to proprietary APIs
